chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1470 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. FRESH CASE 1.For orders on office objections 2.For orders on CMA 5771/25 3.For orders on CMA 5772/25 4.For hearing of main case 10-09-2025 Mr. Ghulam Murtaza Buriro, Advocate for the petitioner. **** Counsel for the petitioner, under instructions, does not press instant petition and submits that the petitioner will proceed with his complaint, which is pending before the Complaint Redressal Committee (CRC). Order accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
